miwi        2011-01-30 12:08:52 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/rubygem-rmail   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  RMail is a lightweight mail library containing various
  utility classes and modules that allow ruby scripts to
  parse, modify, and generate MIME mail messages.
  
  PR:             ports/153820
  Submitted by:   Eric Freeman <freebsdports at chillibear.com>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1053    +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile

  1.1       +2 -0      ports/mail/rubygem-rmail/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/mail/rubygem-rmail/pkg-descr (new)
